steps.title: Translate the definition to an equation
steps.content: The problem tells us that force $F$ is the product of mass and acceleration. The word product indicates multiplication, so: $$F = \text{mass} \times \text{acceleration}$$

steps.title: Substitute the given values
steps.content: We are given that mass is 41 kg and acceleration is $a$ m/s². Substituting these values: $$F = 41 \times a = 41a$$ This matches choice A — A is correct.
